name: Cherry and Raspberry Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Pit and chop the cherries.
2. Add the next three ingredients to the cherries.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil and cook for 10 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. Add the raspberries and sugar to the mixture.
5. Return to a boil and continue cooking until reaching jam stage (approximately 15 minutes).
6. Remove from heat, stir, and skim any impurities for 5 minutes.
7. Pour into hot, sterile jars and seal.
